top_signals.title: Europe Must Increase Space Autonomy: ESA's Aschbacher
top_signals.summary:
The man who oversees Europe's space agenda says the continent needs to do much more as it pursues greater autonomy in orbit.
Europe is trailing the US in efforts to develop a space economy, underscored by SpaceX's mega IPO in June. Josef Aschbacher, Director General of the European Space Agency, spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rheinmetall, MBDA to develop laser weapon for German Navy
top_signals.summary: Rheinmetall and MBDA aim to field an operational laser weapon for the German Navy in 2029.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
